title: Pinpoint Ledger Field
prompt:
Create a production-ready Pinpoint Ledger Field using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a calm reusable background surface made from a sparse ledger of tiny neutral points, with one amber pinpoint that shifts between three labelled coordinates when the user selects a coordinate button. The points should create quiet spatial structure behind content rather than compete with it. Use a white or very pale #F4F5F6 Bento canvas, 22px rounded outer corners, a subtle #ECECEE border, soft neutral shadow, #111111 labels, and #4A4A4F helper text. Amber is the only bright accent. The card surface itself must not use a gradient.

Use real buttons with aria-pressed, a labelled group, and a polite live region for the active coordinate. Every button has a 44px target with a 3px dark focus ring; click, Enter, and Space must all select the coordinate. Hover may lift 2px in 180ms and press may compress 1px in 90ms. Move the amber pinpoint using a stiffness 280, damping 25 spring, while the coordinate copy fades over 160ms. The neutral point matrix is decorative and must be aria-hidden; the active coordinate must also be named in text. Do not use timers, random values, storage, remote media, or network requests.

Ensure the field remains legible at 320px and can expand gracefully in a large detail preview without changing density. Meet AA contrast, use transform and opacity when animating, and honor prefers-reduced-motion with an immediate update or 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
*/ .uiwiki-pinpoint{position:relative;min-height:160px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background-color:#f4f5f6;background-image:radial-gradient(#d4d4d8 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:18px 18px}.uiwiki-pinpoint i{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;background:#f59e0b;transition:transform 240ms ease}.uiwiki-pinpoint button{min-height:44px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:12px;background:#fff;font-weight:800}.uiwiki-pinpoint button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-pinpoint i{transition:none}}
